compiled_state.title: Tier D: write/sync core -> rebar._store/ behind REBAR_WRITE_CORE (the crux)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Tier D: rebar._store ported, wired, flipped to python default; soak green (probe 141/141 isolated+live, 285 interfaces+integration, mixed-impl storm, fsck clean).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Tier D COMPLETE & RETIRED (2026-06-12). Ported -> flipped -> soaked -> retired the bash write/sync core into rebar._store (lock/event_append/push/sync). ONE unified fcntl+mkdir lock across seam/ticket_txn/compaction/reconciler (stiff-mop-lane fixed). Deleted bash core + ticket-append-event.sh + rebar._switch (last kill-switch) + bash-internal suites (~5,240 LOC net). Kept mkdir leg for mixed-version-fleet safety (drop deferred to full-ecosystem migration). Fixed an async-push child-import bug surfaced by retirement. Verify: full non-integration suite 1555/0; probe 141/141 isolated+live; storm/claim-storm/concurrency-regression/push-policy green; fsck clean. Commits 57114212 (port), be3cdd7e (flip), 6f3d8784 (retire).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
